channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇦🇲🇪🇺 Armenia Pro-Western Leader Wins Election Despite Russian Pressure
item.description: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan Civil Contract party won Armenias parliamentary election, securing a mandate to continue pivoting away from Russia and toward Europe despite significant opposition from Moscow-aligned forces.

item.title: ☢️⚠️ Nuclear Powers Increasingly Dependent on Atomic Weapons Amid Global Tensions
item.description: SIPRI Yearbook reports nuclear-armed states are modernizing and expanding arsenals, with China adding warheads fastest. Total global nuclear stockpile remains at around 12,100 warheads as deterrence takes center stage.

item.title: 🇰🇷👩⚖️ South Korea Names First Female Prime Minister as President Lee Marks One Year
item.description: President Lee Jae-myung appointed Han Seong-sook as South Koreas first female PM in decades, as his administration focuses on AI development and pragmatic diplomacy with North Korea.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon reports nearly 3,500 Israeli strikes during ceasefire period
item.description: Lebanon's defense minister says Israel carried out nearly 3,500 airstrikes and hundreds of controlled explosions since the U.S.-announced ceasefire on April 16, highlighting continued violence despite formal truce.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine recaptures over 600 square kilometers of territory in 2026
item.description: Ukraine's military chief reports retaking more than 600 sq km this year, with independent battlefield mappers confirming Russia's advances have slowed or reversed in recent months.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia's fuel crisis deepens as Ukraine steps up strikes on oil infrastructure
item.description: Ukrainian drone attacks on Russian oil refineries are causing significant fuel shortages, with Russian military logistics increasingly strained as Ukraine targets energy infrastructure deep inside Russian territory.

item.title: 💰 Nuclear Weapons Spending Hits Record $119 Billion as Arms Race Accelerates
item.description: Global spending on nuclear weapons reached a record $119 billion in 2025, with the US accounting for the largest share as all nuclear powers modernize their arsenals amid rising tensions.

item.title: ⚖️ ICC Chief Prosecutor Karim Khan Suspended Over Sexual Misconduct Allegations
item.description: International Criminal Court prosecutor Karim Khan has been suspended amid sexual misconduct allegations, throwing the court's leadership into crisis as it handles major war crimes cases.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 Xi Jinping Visits North Korea for First Time in Seven Years, Strengthening Ties
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping made a rare visit to North Korea, calling for strengthened strategic cooperation as Beijing seeks to counter US influence in the region amid ongoing tensions.

item.title: 🐛 Flesh-Eating Screwworm Parasite Spreads Beyond Texas, Canada Reports Cases
item.description: The New World screwworm, a flesh-eating parasite that attacks livestock and humans, has spread beyond Texas with cases now reported in Canada, prompting agricultural emergency measures.

item.title: 📞 Zelensky Holds "Very Positive" Call With US Envoys Witkoff and Kellogg
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelensky discussed Moscow's intentions and ongoing peace efforts in what he described as a very positive call with US special envoys Witkoff and Kellogg.

item.title: ⚔️ Netanyahu Openly Defies Trump With Iran Strike Amid Lebanon Ceasefire
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu launched strikes on Iran despite US President Trump's push for de-escalation, testing the limits of the US-Israel relationship and Trump's diplomatic initiatives.

item.title: 🏛️ Pentagon Policy Sparks Controversy Among Mormon Community
item.description: Pentagon policies have drawn criticism from the Mormon community, prompting internal reviews and potential policy adjustments to address religious accommodation concerns.

item.title: 💊 Bipartisan Insulin Legislation Gains Momentum in Congress
item.description: Bipartisan efforts to cap insulin prices are advancing in Congress, with lawmakers from both parties supporting measures to reduce costs for diabetic Americans.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Iran and Israel Halt Strikes After Trump Appeal
item.description: Iran and Israel have both announced a halt to strikes against each other following US President Trump's diplomatic intervention, though regional tensions remain high.

channel.item: 📦 China Exports Surge on Chip Demand and Front-Loaded Orders https://www.reuters.com/world/china/china-exports-set-strong-may-front-loaded-orders-chip-demand-2026-06-08/ <Chinese exports exceeded expectations in May, driven by semiconductor demand and companies rushing orders ahead of potential tariff increases. Economy Reuters Mon, 09 Jun 2026 00:03:00 +0000

item.title: 📈 India Inflation Rises to 4% on Food and Fuel Costs
item.description: India's inflation likely rose to 4% in May as food and fuel prices climbed, keeping pressure on the central bank's monetary policy decisions.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇮🇷 Iran and Israel Pull Back After Fierce Exchange of Attacks
item.description: After days of intense strikes, Iran and Israel have both declared pauses in attacks, with Trump claiming credit for de-escalation while regional actors assess the damage.

item.title: 📡 China Begins Large-Scale Delivery of Gallium Chips for 6G Network
item.description: China has started mass delivery of gallium-based semiconductors for its space-ground 6G network, advancing its technological ambitions in next-generation communications.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan Hits Back at Beijing's "Cognitive Warfare" After Coast Guard Patrols
item.description: Taiwan condemned China's coast guard patrols near its eastern waters as "provocative acts," accusing Beijing of cognitive warfare as cross-strait tensions escalate.

item.title: ⚔️ Russia Rejects Ukrainian, European Peace Initiatives, Says Battlefield Will Decide War
item.description: Russia has rejected multiple peace proposals from Ukraine and European partners, insisting that military outcomes will determine the war's conclusion.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Polish Concerns Over Ukraine EU Entry "Solved," Enlargement Chief Says
item.description: European enlargement officials say Poland's concerns about Ukraine's EU accession have been addressed, clearing a key hurdle for Ukraine's integration path.

item.title: 🇹🇷 NATO's Ankara Summit: A Reckoning for the Alliance
item.description: Analysis of NATO's upcoming Ankara summit and the strategic challenges facing the alliance as Turkey hosts key discussions on collective defense.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo XIV warns of 'profound crisis' in historic address
item.description: Pope Leo XIV delivered a historic address warning of a profound crisis facing humanity, calling for renewed focus on peace and human dignity amid global conflicts.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 China's Xi vows unwavering support for North Korea in rare Pyongyang visit
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping made a rare visit to Pyongyang, pledging unwavering support for North Korea amid shared concerns about US regional influence and sanctions pressure.
